title: T-030 — putaway suggest + execute APIs (06-b)
prompt:
# T-030 — putaway suggest + execute

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.2 FR-SC-BE-024/025; 05-WH §8.4 algorithm + §9.1 FEFO
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Land `GET /putaway/suggest/:lpId` returning the per-05-WH §8.4 strategy result plus top-3 alternatives, and `POST /putaway` to execute the move (with override + reason_code).

## Implementation contract
1. GET handler runs the 4-step strategy (FEFO zone → FIFO zone → product.preferred_zone_id → default) and returns `{ suggested_location, reason_code, strategy, alternatives[3], lp_details }`. SLO P95 <300ms.
2. POST handler: body `{ lp_id, location_id, suggested_location_id?, override: boolean, override_reason_code? }`; validate location exists + available, lp ≠ already at destination; insert stock_moves move_type='putaway' + lp.location_id update; if override=true with reason_code, audit metadata captures suggested vs selected.
3. If override=true and override_reason_code missing ⇒ 400 SC_OVERRIDE_REASON_REQUIRED.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/putaway/suggest/[lpId]/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/putaway/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/server/services/warehouse-putaway.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/api/warehouse-putaway.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an LP with product P having a FEFO zone match, when GET /putaway/suggest/:lpId runs, then strategy='fefo' and alternatives[] contains the next-best 3 locations
2. Given POST /putaway with override=true and missing override_reason_code, when the request is validated, then 400 SC_OVERRIDE_REASON_REQUIRED
3. Given a successful POST /putaway with location ≠ suggested, when the response returns 200, then a stock_moves row with move_type='putaway' is inserted and a scanner_audit_log row records suggested vs selected with metadata.override_reason_code

## Test strategy
- RED: write warehouse-putaway.test.ts asserting strategy resolution + override-reason-required + audit metadata before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test api/warehouse-putaway'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow lp.location_id to remain unchanged on success
- Do not skip the lp ≠ destination check
- Do not let client override the strategy field

pipeline_inputs.description: Putaway suggestion endpoint (FEFO/FIFO/product/default strategy) + execute endpoint with override + reason_code capture.
pipeline_inputs.details: Suggest endpoint runs the 4-step strategy and returns alternatives top 3. Execute endpoint validates location, requires reason_code on override, transactionally writes stock_moves + lp.location update + audit row.

Do not implement label printing trigger (P2)
Do not implement SSCC palet putaway (P2)
